headline: Trump's Pick to Lead Homeland Security Faces Tense Senate Grilling
summary: Lawmakers from both parties questioned Sen. Markwayne Mullin on his temperament, past statements, and readiness to lead DHS.

reactions.quote: Trump's nominee for Homeland Security secretary's maverick, plainspoken style could diverge in key ways with the xenophobic hellscape championed by Stephen Miller in the White House.
Trump announced the new head of Homeland Security will be Markwayne Mullin. He said, "Get me someone whose name sounds like a serial killer!"
